title: Zannichellia contorta
taxonomy: Zannichellia contorta is classified within the plant kingdom as a member of the family Zannichelliaceae and order Alismatales. This plant belongs to the genus Zannichellia, which contains several species of submerged aquatic plants. Zannichellia contorta is native to the Old World, specifically in Europe and parts of Asia. The classification of Zannichellia contorta places it among the monocots, characterized by having one cotyledon in their seeds. As a member of the plant kingdom, Zannichellia contorta is an aquatic plant adapted to living in freshwater environments.

intro: Zannichellia contorta, also known as twisted hornwort, is a submerged aquatic plant belonging to the family Zannichelliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage.
